strings.SS2_KNIGHT_DESCRIPTION:
The Knight is a skilled expert in melee combat, dueling and parrying foes with precise timing and execution.

<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > parry.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..and so he left, battered to the core of hope.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..and so he vanished, shield shattered and hope snuffed out.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_BODY_LORE: why are there knights in space
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_PASSIVE_DESC: A buff ward surronds you that grants allies in its radius <style=cIsDamage>20% attack speed</style> and <style=cIsDamage>20% damage</style>.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_PRIMARY_SWORD_DESC: Slice forward for <style=cIsDamage>200% damage</style>. Every third hit stabs forward for <style=cIsDamage>400% damage</style>. While blocking, bash enemies for <style=cIsDamage>240% damage</style>.
strings.SS2_KEYWORD_PARRY: <style=cKeywordName>Parry</style><style=cSub>Block an incoming hit to <style=cIsUtility>stun</style> and deal <style=cIsDamage>350% damage</style> to all enemies around you. You also become <style=cIsUtility>immune to damage</style> for 1 second.</style>
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_SECONDARY_SHIELD_DESC: Raise your shield, gaining <style=cIsUtility>400 armor</style>. Use before an incoming strike to <style=cIsDamage>parry</style> it and <color=#fa78f3>Empower</color> your next skill.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_SECONDARY_SHIELD_DESC2: Raise your shield, gaining <style=cIsUtility>400 armor</style> and replacing your jump with a <style=cIsUtility>roll</style>. Use before an incoming strike to <style=cIsDamage>parry</style> it and <color=#fa78f3>Empower</color> your next skill.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_SHIELD_BASH_DESC: Shield Bash in front of you for <style=cIsDamage>240% damage</style> and <style=cIsUtility>stun</style> enemies hit.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_UTILITY_LEAP_DESC: Dash foward, spinning and slicing repeatedly for <style=cIsDamage>120% damage</style> per hit. The number of hits scales with attack speed.
strings.SS2_KNIGHT_SPECIAL_BANNER_DESC: Thrust a banner into the ground for <style=cIsDamage>750% damage</style>. Nearby allies <style=cIsDamage>smite</style> enemies with their attacks, reducing their armor and <style=cIsHealing>restoring health</style>.
